client.note: Single zip under 2GB: upload oathbound-client.zip to the v0.1.0 GitHub release (url above). Over 2GB: use scripts/publish-client.ps1 to split + upload + fill 'parts' with the chunk URLs (the launcher concatenates + extracts them).

news.title: Welcome to Oathbound Realms
news.body: Create your account in the launcher, set a PIN, and press Play. The whole game lives in one in-game dashboard (the coin button or /oath).

events.title: Arena is live
events.body: Queue 1v1–4v4 best-of-5 matches — free or wager SOL. Climb the leaderboard and become a Class King.

notes: Custom launcher with in-launcher account creation + PIN.
Economy simplified to gold + SOL; free supply battle pass.
PvP arena, wagering, PvP levels, Class Kings, PvE Trial, Guild War + treasury.
